title: Add browser beforeunload confirmation for unsaved changes
body: Issue requires: 'If user tries to navigate away with unsaved changes → show browser confirmation'. The ExerciseContentEditor already has hasUnsavedChanges state but doesn't wire up beforeunload event. Should add a useEffect that calls window.onbeforeunload when hasUnsavedChanges is true.
rationale: Part of the original issue acceptance criteria that wasn't fully implemented
